## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new GrowthX team structure and align on content priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GrowthX Team Transition:** Jo Kaminska is the new Strategy/Analytics lead; Mariana Montezzana moves to a production role, ensuring continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**New Content Priorities:** Focus shifts to high-revenue tours (Whale Shark, Luxury Party Cruise, Tierra Sagrada All-Inclusive) and private experiences.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [**Article Review Bottleneck:** Cabo has a backlog of articles (some \>1 month old) awaiting review, delaying traffic generation.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Focus:** Carlos (Zoho) will collaborate on technical SEO for the 100% JavaScript site, specifically to improve crawlability.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team Transition

  - [GrowthX announced a team reorg:](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**Jo Kaminska:** New Strategy & Analytics Lead.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**Mariana Montezzana:** Production Lead, ensuring project continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Communication will remain on Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**Overall Traffic:** +1% WoW.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [Cancun traffic is recovering after a dip.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Vallarta and Cabo saw slight, similar decreases.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Reporting Automation:**](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Problem:** Manual reports are time-consuming, pulling data from 6+ sources (3 destinations, Analytics, Search Console).](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Solution:** Explore an automated dashboard with separate tabs for each destination.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

### Content Review Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** A backlog of articles for Cabo (some \>1 month old) awaits review.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [**Impact:** Delays traffic generation.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Lorena will review the articles after Lu sends the links.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)

### New Content Priorities

  - [**Whale Shark Tour:**](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Top-selling tour during Black Friday and last month.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [**Need:** Pre-booking blog post to manage guest expectations regarding federal restrictions.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [**New Tours:**](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Tierra Sagrada All-Inclusive:** Content already included in the "Cabo with Friends" combo post.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Luxury Party Cruise:** New 95-ft catamaran (200-person capacity) launching early 2026; content creation can start now.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [**High-Revenue Private Tours:**](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High-value tours (\~$3k) offer significant revenue potential.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [**Status:** "Private Catamaran in Cabo San Lucas" article is ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive traffic to the `/cabo/private` landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Technical SEO Collaboration

  - [**Context:** The site is 100% JavaScript, creating crawlability challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Collaboration:** Carlos (Zoho) will work with Jo on technical SEO, while Isabel (Adventures Group) will handle content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Focus:** Improve SEO for high-importance tour sales pages.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Lu:** Send links to pending Cabo articles to Lorena.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [**Lorena:** Review the pending articles.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [**Mariana:** Forward Whale Shark tour info to Jo for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
      - [Send an introductory email to Isabel.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
      - [Share a summary of past results via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
      - [Present Q1 2026 content topics for review.](https://fathom.video/share/U_TEzuf84QcVQVmr8sMsfceFxjBT-BH6?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
